events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: Sequence check: Wire pulling (feeders & branch) industrial site. Work in-progress. Photo set shows work after a hold point, earlier prerequisite step not shown and no signoff page attached. Reference NEC 200.6, 210.5 identification. Task: check order of work and catch sequence violation. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since prerequisite step not shown and no signoff, sequence violation? In construction QA, hold point requires signoff before proceeding. If no signoff, fail sequence. But maybe needs_more_info because earlier step not shown? However scenario says work after a hold point, earlier prerequisite step not shown and no signoff page attached. That is a sequence violation: proceeding without documented prerequisite signoff. Decision fail. Risk medium/high? Industrial site, feeders & branch wire pulling without prerequisite signoff could lead to safety/code issues. Could be high due to unknown readiness of raceway/inspection. But no dangerous condition described, just documentation/sequence. Risk medium. Work stage in-progress. Percent complete maybe 50. Component conditions none. Findings: prerequisite hold point signoff missing; work advanced without documented approval. Actions: stop work, verify prerequisite completion, obtain signoff, then resume. Rationale. References: QA hold point procedure, NEC 200.6/210.5 identification maybe not directly relevant but included. Need output JSON exactly.
